name: Potato Parsley Bisque
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Red-skinned potatoes, unpeeled, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the almonds in boiling water for 30 seconds.
2. Drain, and plunge almonds into cold water. Drain again.
3. Squeeze the almonds between your fingertips to remove the skins. Compost or discard the skins.
4. Put the blanched almonds and 1 cup of the vegetable stock in a blender, and blend until smooth (about 1 minute).
5. In a large pot, combine the potatoes, leeks, and the remaining 4 cups vegetable stock. Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Cover and boil until the potatoes are tender (about 10-15 minutes).
6. Stir in the blanched almond mixture, parsley, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring often, until thickened (about 2 minutes). Transfer the soup to a food processor and process in batches if necessary until smooth.
7. Serve immediately.
